channel.title: Linux VM on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Linux VM on DevOpsTales

item.title: Run Linux VM on macOS with Lima and Colima
item.description: Running Linux virtual machines on macOS has become essential for developers working with containers, Kubernetes, and cloud-native technologies. Lima (Linux on macOS) and Colima (Containers on Lima) provide an elegant solution for running Linux workloads on Mac with minimal overhead and maximum compatibility.

item.title: Run Podman on macOS with Lima
item.description: Running Podman on macOS through Lima provides a lightweight, Docker-compatible container runtime without the overhead of Docker Desktop. This setup is ideal for developers who want a rootless, daemonless container experience on Mac with minimal resource consumption.
